title: coppensia hydrophila
intro: Coppensia hydrophila, also known as the swamp buttercup, is a plant species that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coppensia hydrophila include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Coppensia hydrophila can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
